name: fairground-seasonal
summary: A seasonal fair — a field or plaza temporarily taken over by tents, stages, game booths, and bunting. Noise, smell, color. Could be a harvest fair, a high holiday market, or a traveling carnival.

accent.purpose: central performance ring or maypole area

primary_palette.note: spring festival with maypole at the heart
troupe or minstrel fair with performance stage
harvest or solstice fire as centerpiece

story_prompts: harvest fair at peak — every booth busy, the maypole dance in progress
night — lanterns lit, bonfire roaring, dancers around the ring
opening morning — booths setting up, banners going up, vendors arguing
end of fair — most booths packed, ribbons in the mud, one last drunk by the fire
a thief has stolen the prize and crowd is turning into a mob

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: outdoor daylight by default; evening/night scenes 0.35-0.5 with very warm lantern-fire tint

anti_patterns: invisible walls (iw) perimeter — fairs bleed into surrounding ground
booths and stalls must form loose aisles, never a grid
bunting-line and flag-pole props should break up vertical space — a flat fair reads wrong
don't skimp on scatter — the mess IS the vibe; cleanliness reads as a closed fair
